questions.question: What was the day of the week on 23ʳᵈ February 1995? >23 फरवरी 1995 को सप्ताह का कौन सा दिन था?
questions.explanation: Remember the code –> 1 4 4 0 2 5 0 3 6 1 4 6 → for Non-Leap Year J F M A M J J A S O N D → All months of the year Now, Add the date, month code, last 2 digits of the year and the no. of leap years. Date → 23 Month code → 4 Last 2 digits of the year {1995}→ 95 No. of leap years → 23 {Just divide the Last 2 digits of the year by 4 and write the quotient} Now, 23 + 4 + 95 + 23 = 145 Now just find the no. of odd days = 145/7 = 5 {Remainder} If No. of odd days comes out to be 01 → Sunday 02 → Monday 03 → Tuesday 04 → Wednesday 05 → Thursday 06 → Friday 00 → Saturday Here in this case, the odd no. comes out to be 5 So, the day of the week on 23ʳᵈ February 1995 was Thursday. Note:- The trick changed a little bit for leap years and other centuries i.e., 1800s, 2000s, etc. >कोड याद रखें -> 1 4 4 0 2 5 0 3 6 1 4 6 → गैर-लीप वर्ष के लिए J F M A M J J A S O N D → वर्ष के सभी महीने अब, तारीख, महीने का कोड, वर्ष के अंतिम 2 अंक और लीप वर्षों की संख्या जोड़ें। तारीख → 23 महीने का कोड → 4 वर्ष के अंतिम 2 अंक {1995}→ 95 लीप वर्षों की संख्या → 23 {बस वर्ष के अंतिम 2 अंकों को 4 से विभाजित करें और भागफल लिखें} अब, 23 + 4 + 95 + 23 = 145 अब बस संख्या ज्ञात करें विषम दिनों की संख्या = 145/7 = 5 {शेष} यदि विषम दिनों की संख्या 01 → रविवार 02 → सोमवार 03 → मंगलवार 04 → बुधवार 05 → गुरुवार 06 → शुक्रवार 00 → शनिवार यहाँ इस मामले में, विषम संख्या 5 है इसलिए, 23 फरवरी 1995 को सप्ताह का दिन गुरुवार था। नोट:- लीप वर्ष और अन्य शताब्दियों यानी 1800, 2000 आदि के लिए चाल थोड़ी बदल गई।

questions.question: Three statements are given, followed by three conclusions numbered I, II and III. Assuming the statements to be true, even if they seem to be at variance with commonly known facts, decide which of the conclusions logically follow[s]from the statements. Statements: All actors are artists. Some artists are actress. No actress is a hero. Conclusions: I. No artist is a hero. II. No hero is an actress. III. Some artists are actors. >तीन कथन दिए गए हैं, जिसके बाद तीन निष्कर्ष I, II और III दिए गए हैं। कथनों को सत्य मानते हुए, भले ही वे आम तौर पर ज्ञात तथ्यों से भिन्न प्रतीत होते हों, तय करें कि कौन सा निष्कर्ष कथनों का तार्किक रूप से अनुसरण करता है। कथन: सभी अभिनेता कलाकार हैं। कुछ कलाकार अभिनेत्री हैं। कोई भी अभिनेत्री नायक नहीं है। निष्कर्ष: I. कोई भी कलाकार नायक नहीं है। II. कोई भी नायक अभिनेत्री नहीं है। III. कुछ कलाकार अभिनेता हैं।
options: Only conclusion III follows.>केवल निष्कर्ष III अनुसरण करता है।
All the conclusions follow. >सभी निष्कर्ष अनुसरण करते हैं।
Only conclusions II and III follow. >केवल निष्कर्ष II और III अनुसरण करते हैं।
Only conclusions I and III follow.>केवल निष्कर्ष I और III अनुसरण करते हैं।
questions.explanation: ![](https://www.thepunditsofficial.in/admin/uploads/questions/q_69970543055109.95430131.png) ![](https://www.thepunditsofficial.in/admin/uploads/questions/q_6997054316b050.01541786.png) Hence, only conclusions II and III follow > ![](https://www.thepunditsofficial.in/admin/uploads/questions/q_69970543244ba0.70545143.png) ![](https://www.thepunditsofficial.in/admin/uploads/questions/q_6997054338c979.78080814.png) अतः केवल निष्कर्ष II और III ही अनुसरण करते हैं

Six numbers 3, 5, 6, 7, 2 and 9 are written on different faces of a dice. Two positions of this dice are shown in the figure below. Find the number on the face opposite to the one having 9. ![](https://www.thepunditsofficial.in/admin/uploads/questions/q_69970543575d39.70004236.png) >एक पासे के अलग-अलग फलकों पर छह संख्याएँ 3, 5, 6, 7, 2 और 9 लिखी हैं। नीचे दिए गए चित्र में इस पासे की दो स्थितियाँ दर्शाई गई हैं। 9 वाले फलक के विपरीत फलक पर संख्या ज्ञात कीजिए। ![](https://www.thepunditsofficial.in/admin/uploads/questions/q_699705436f2318.35325384.png)
questions.explanation: 5, 6, 2 and 7 can be seen along-with 3. Hence, only 9 is left which must be opposite to 3. Hence, 3 is the correct answer. > 5, 6, 2 और 7 को 3 के साथ देखा जा सकता है। अतः केवल 9 शेष है जो 3 के विपरीत होना चाहिए। अतः 3 सही उत्तर है।

questions.question: All the alphabets in the word ‘TRANSFORMATION’ are arranged in the alphabetical order. How many alphabets are therein the English alphabetical series between the alphabet which is third from the left end and the one which is fourth from the right end in the newly formed letter-cluster?
questions.explanation: As per Alphabetical order – ‘AAFIMNNOORRSTT’ Alphabet which is third from the left end – ‘F’ Alphabet which is fourth from the right end – ‘R’ Alphabets between F & R – G,H,I,J,K,L,M,N,O,P,Q = 11 Directly calculate by = R{18} – F{6} – 1 = 12 – 1 = 11

questions.question: In a certain code language, ‘talk to me’ is coded as ‘aq yt bl’ and ‘do not talk’ is coded as ‘yt me wc’. What is the code for ‘talk’ in that language? >एक निश्चित कोड भाषा में, ‘talk to me’ को ‘aq yt bl’ के रूप में कोडित किया जाता है और ‘do not talk’ को ‘yt me wc’ के रूप में कोडित किया जाता है। उस भाषा में ‘talk’ के लिए कोड क्या है?
questions.explanation: In both sentences only ‘talk’ is common. And in coding language, only ‘yt’ is common in both. Hence ‘talk’ will be coded as ‘yt’. > दोनों वाक्यों में केवल ‘talk’ समान है। और कोडिंग भाषा में, दोनों में केवल ‘yt’ समान है। इसलिए ‘talk’ को ‘yt’ के रूप में कोडित किया जाएगा।

questions.question: 82 is related to 9 following certain logic. Following the same logic, 197 is related to 14. To which of the following numbers is 442 related, following the same logic?
questions.explanation: The pattern here is, 82 = square of 9+ 1 197 = square of 14+ 1 442 = square of 21+ 1 Hence, the correct option will be 21.

Breaking down 13 into 1 and 3 and then performing mathematical operations on 1 and 3 is not allowed.] [3, 7, 40] [11, 1, 30] >निम्नलिखित चार विकल्पों में से तीन एक निश्चित तरीके से समान हैं और इस प्रकार एक समूह बनाते हैं। वह कौन सा है जो उस समूह से संबंधित नहीं है? [नोट: संख्याओं को उसके घटक अंकों में तोड़े बिना, पूर्ण संख्याओं पर संचालन किया जाना चाहिए। उदाहरण के लिए 13 - 13 पर संचालन जैसे कि 13 में जोड़ना/घटाना/गुणा करना आदि किया जा सकता है। 13 को 1 और 3 में तोड़ना और फिर 1 और 3 पर गणितीय संचालन करना अनुमत नहीं है।] [3, 7, 40] [11, 1, 30]
questions.explanation: Pattern followed for [a, b, c] here is :- [a × b] + 19 = c [3 × 7] + 19 = 40 [11 × 1] + 19 = 30 [9 × 3] + 19 = 46 Option B [15 × 2] + 19 = 49 → Option C [8 × 4] + 19 = 51 → Option D But [6, 1, 23] is not following this pattern Hence, option A will be the correct answer. >यहाँ [a, b, c] के लिए अनुसरण किया गया पैटर्न है:- [a × b] + 19 = c [3 × 7] + 19 = 40 [11 × 1] + 19 = 30 [9 × 3] + 19 = 46 विकल्प B [15 × 2] + 19 = 49 → विकल्प C [8 × 4] + 19 = 51 → विकल्प D लेकिन [6, 1, 23] इस पैटर्न का अनुसरण नहीं कर रहा है इसलिए, विकल्प A सही उत्तर होगा।

questions.explanation: • and + are moving step by step in clock-wise direction. The next combination would be option A. > • और + घड़ी की दिशा में कदम दर कदम आगे बढ़ रहे हैं। अगला संयोजन विकल्प A होगा।

questions.question: In which of the following sessions of the Indian National Congress did George Yule becomes the President in 1888? >1888 में भारतीय राष्ट्रीय कांग्रेस के निम्नलिखित में से किस अधिवेशन में जॉर्ज यूल अध्यक्ष बने?
questions.explanation: George Yule became the President of the Indian National Congress during its fourth session, which was held in Allahabad in 1888. This session marked a significant moment in the Congress's history as George Yule was the first non-Indian to hold the position of President. >जॉर्ज यूल भारतीय राष्ट्रीय कांग्रेस के चौथे सत्र के दौरान इसके अध्यक्ष बने, जो 1888 में इलाहाबाद में आयोजित किया गया था। यह सत्र कांग्रेस के इतिहास में एक महत्वपूर्ण क्षण था क्योंकि जॉर्ज यूल अध्यक्ष पद पर आसीन होने वाले पहले गैर-भारतीय थे।

questions.question: Which of the following personalities was NOT associated with the Prarthana Samaj?
questions.explanation: • Atmaram Pandurang: Founder of the Prarthana Samaj in 1867. • Mahadev Govind Ranade: A prominent social reformer and judge who joined the movement in 1870. • R.G. Bhandarkar: An eminent historian and Sanskrit scholar who was a significant member of the Samaj.

questions.question: Who among the following started the practice of Sijda and Paibos in his/her court?
questions.explanation: Sultan Balban implemented the Iranian court system Sijda and Paibos in his court. Balban implemented the policy of blood and iron in his kingdom. Balban started the Persian festival Nauroz.

questions.question: In which Buddhist texts are all the rules governing the conduct of the monastic community [Sangha] compiled?
questions.explanation: • Vinayapitak was the book in which all the rules made for the Buddhist sangha was written downin. Vinayapitaka literally means "basket of discipline". • Buddha's teachings are included in Sutta Pitaka andtopics related to philosophy are included in Abhidhamma Pitaka.

questions.question: Who built the Vittala Temple of Hampi?
questions.explanation: The Vittala Temple in Hampi is the grandest of all monuments in Hampi and represents the epitome of the Vijaynagara style of architecture. Built in the 15ᵗʰ century by King Devaraya II, it is dedicated to Lord Vittala or Krishna, an incarnation of Lord Vishnu.

questions.question: Famous singer Ustad Aamir Khan belonged to which of the following gharana of music?
questions.explanation: • Indore, Agra, Jaipur, Gwalior, Kirana andPatiala etc are prominent among the famous houses ofHindustani classical music. • Famous singer Ustad AamirKhan is the founder Indore Gharana. His singing style is a mixture of Kirana and Bhindi Bazaar Gharana. It isnoteworthy that his grandfather Change Khan used tosing in the court of the last ruler of the Mughal empire,Bahadur Shah Zafar while his father Shahmir Khanused to play Sarangi in the court of Holkar, Royalfamily of Indore.

questions.question: On which river is Cuttack city situated? >कटक शहर किस नदी पर स्थित है?
questions.explanation: Cuttack, a historic city in Odisha, India, is situated at the confluence of the Mahanadi and its distributary, the Kathajodi rivers. >कटक भारतीय राज्य ओडिशा का एक ऐतिहासिक शहर है, जो महानदी और उसकी सहायक नदी कथाजोड़ी के संगम पर स्थित है।

questions.question: When was the Konark Sun Temple included in the UNESCO World Heritage List? >कोणार्क सूर्य मंदिर को यूनेस्को की विश्व धरोहर सूची में कब शामिल किया गया?
questions.explanation: The Konark Sun Temple was included in the UNESCO World Heritage List in 1984. This temple is located in Puri, Odisha. It was built in the 13ᵗʰ century by the ruler of the Gangas dynasty Narasimha Dev I. > कोणार्क सूर्य मंदिर को 1984 में यूनेस्को की विश्व धरोहर सूची में शामिल किया गया था। यह मंदिर ओडिशा के पुरी में स्थित है। इसका निर्माण 13वीं शताब्दी में गंग वंश के शासक नरसिंह देव प्रथम ने करवाया था।

questions.question: Which states are involved in the joint venture of Chambal Project? >चंबल परियोजना के संयुक्त उद्यम में कौन से राज्य शामिल हैं?
options: Rajasthan and Uttar Pradesh>राजस्थान और उत्तर प्रदेश
Uttar Pradesh and Madhya Pradesh >उत्तर प्रदेश और मध्य प्रदेश
Rajasthan and Madhya Pradesh>राजस्थान और मध्य प्रदेश
questions.explanation: Rajasthan and Madhya Pradesh are involved in the joint venture of Chambal River. Rajasthan and Madhya Pradesh have equal shares in this project, with each state contributing towards the construction and maintenance of the infrastructure. >चंबल नदी के संयुक्त उद्यम में राजस्थान और मध्य प्रदेश शामिल हैं। इस परियोजना में राजस्थान और मध्य प्रदेश की बराबर हिस्सेदारी है, प्रत्येक राज्य बुनियादी ढांचे के निर्माण और रखरखाव में योगदान दे रहा है।

questions.question: Which of the following mountain pass connects the link between kullu valley with the Lahaul and spiti valleys of Himachal Pradesh, India? >निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा पर्वतीय दर्रा कुल्लू घाटी को भारत के हिमाचल प्रदेश के लाहौल और स्पीति घाटियों से जोड़ता है?
questions.explanation: Rohtang Pass connects the link between kullu valley with the Lahaul and spiti valleys of Himachal Pradesh. The pass lies on the watershed between the Chenab and Beas basins. >रोहतांग दर्रा कुल्लू घाटी को हिमाचल प्रदेश की लाहौल और स्पीति घाटियों से जोड़ता है। यह दर्रा चिनाब और ब्यास घाटियों के बीच जलग्रहण क्षेत्र में स्थित है।

questions.question: Which of the following order of planets is correct as per distance the increasing order from the Earth?
questions.explanation: • According to the increasing distance from earth, the order of the planet- Venus, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune. • The order of the planets according to the increasing distance to the sun- Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune.

questions.question: Which of the following is a coarse grained igneous rock that contains quarts and feldspar? >निम्नलिखित में से कौन सी मोटे कणों वाली आग्नेय चट्टान है जिसमें क्वार्ट्ज और फेल्डस्पार शामिल हैं?
questions.explanation: Igneous rocks form when hot molten rock crystallizes and soldifies. Igneous rocks are divided into two groups, intrusive or extrusive, depending upon where the molten rock solidifies. Granite is a coarse-grained rock composed predominantly of feldspar and quarts, is an intrusive rock. >आग्नेय चट्टानें तब बनती हैं जब गर्म पिघली हुई चट्टान क्रिस्टलीकृत होकर ठोस हो जाती है। आग्नेय चट्टानों को दो समूहों में विभाजित किया जाता है, घुसपैठ या बहिर्मुखी, यह इस बात पर निर्भर करता है कि पिघली हुई चट्टान कहाँ जमती है। ग्रेनाइट एक मोटे दाने वाली चट्टान है जो मुख्य रूप से फेल्डस्पार और क्वार्ट्स से बनी होती है, यह एक घुसपैठ वाली चट्टान है।

questions.question: Recently, which team won the 42nd Ranji Trophy title? >हाल ही में किस टीम ने 42वां रणजी ट्रॉफी खिताब जीता?
questions.explanation: Mumbai won the 42nd Ranji Trophy title in 2024, defeating Vidarbha by 169 runs on the fifth and final day of the final at the Wankhede Stadium in Mumbai. The Mumbai team’s performance was marked by Dhawal Kulkarni’s exceptional performance, supported by key players like Ajinkya Rahane, Tanush Kotian, and Musheer Khan. >मुंबई ने 2024 में 42वां रणजी ट्रॉफी खिताब जीता, मुंबई के वानखेड़े स्टेडियम में फाइनल के पांचवें और अंतिम दिन विदर्भ को 169 रनों से हराया। मुंबई की टीम के प्रदर्शन में धवल कुलकर्णी का शानदार प्रदर्शन शामिल रहा, जिसे अजिंक्य रहाणे, तनुश कोटियन और मुशीर खान जैसे प्रमुख खिलाड़ियों का समर्थन मिला।

questions.question: PM Vishwakarma Yojana, recently seen in the news, is launched by which ministry? >हाल ही में खबरों में रही पीएम विश्वकर्मा योजना किस मंत्रालय द्वारा शुरू की गई है?
options: Ministry of Rural Development>ग्रामीण विकास मंत्रालय
Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry, and Dairying >मत्स्य पालन, पशुपालन और डेयरी मंत्रालय
Ministry of Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises>सूक्ष्म, लघु और मध्यम उद्यम मंत्रालय
questions.explanation: The ‘PM Vishwakarma Yojana’ by the Ministry of Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises offers artisans and craftsmen affordable loans, skill training, modern equipment, and promotes digital transactions. With a budget of Rs 13,000 crore, the scheme covers 18 businesses and is set to run for five years until the financial year 2027-28, aiming to boost the growth and development of the micro, small, and medium enterprises sector. >सूक्ष्म, लघु और मध्यम उद्यम मंत्रालय द्वारा शुरू की गई ‘पीएम विश्वकर्मा योजना’ कारीगरों और शिल्पकारों को किफायती ऋण, कौशल प्रशिक्षण, आधुनिक उपकरण प्रदान करती है और डिजिटल लेनदेन को बढ़ावा देती है। 13,000 करोड़ रुपये के बजट वाली यह योजना 18 व्यवसायों को कवर करती है और इसे वित्तीय वर्ष 2027-28 तक पाँच वर्षों तक चलाने की योजना है, जिसका उद्देश्य सूक्ष्म, लघु और मध्यम उद्यम क्षेत्र के विकास को बढ़ावा देना है।

questions.question: Recently, which institute has launched the India’s largest drone pilot organization? >हाल ही में किस संस्थान ने भारत का सबसे बड़ा ड्रोन पायलट संगठन लॉन्च किया है?
questions.explanation: The Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati [IIT-G] has launched India’s largest drone pilot training facility. This program is aligned with PM’s Namo Drone Didi initiative. The program is also tailored for a variety of defence personnel. This initiative supports Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s vision to position India as a prominent drone hub by 2030. > भारतीय प्रौद्योगिकी संस्थान गुवाहाटी [IIT-G] ने भारत की सबसे बड़ी ड्रोन पायलट प्रशिक्षण सुविधा शुरू की है। यह कार्यक्रम प्रधानमंत्री की नमो ड्रोन दीदी पहल के अनुरूप है। यह कार्यक्रम विभिन्न रक्षा कर्मियों के लिए भी तैयार किया गया है। यह पहल प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी के 2030 तक भारत को एक प्रमुख ड्रोन हब के रूप में स्थापित करने के दृष्टिकोण का समर्थन करती है।

questions.question: What is the rank of India in the Henley Passport Index 2025? >हेनले पासपोर्ट इंडेक्स 2025 में भारत का स्थान क्या है?
questions.explanation: India’s passport ranking has dropped to 85th in the Henley Passport Index 2025, down from 80th in 2024. The index evaluates passports based on visa-free access to global destinations. India now allows visa-free travel to 57 countries. The top-ranking passport belongs to Singapore, which offers access to 195 destinations. Over the past two decades, India’s ranking has fluctuated significantly, peaking at 71st in 2006. The index relies on data from the International Air Transport Association [IATA] to assess travel access. >हेनले पासपोर्ट इंडेक्स 2025 में भारत की पासपोर्ट रैंकिंग 2024 में 80वें स्थान से गिरकर 85वें स्थान पर आ गई है। यह इंडेक्स वैश्विक गंतव्यों तक वीज़ा-मुक्त पहुँच के आधार पर पासपोर्ट का मूल्यांकन करता है। भारत अब 57 देशों में वीज़ा-मुक्त यात्रा की अनुमति देता है। शीर्ष रैंकिंग वाला पासपोर्ट सिंगापुर का है, जो 195 गंतव्यों तक पहुँच प्रदान करता है। पिछले दो दशकों में, भारत की रैंकिंग में काफी उतार-चढ़ाव आया है, जो 2006 में 71वें स्थान पर पहुँच गया था। यह इंडेक्स यात्रा पहुँच का आकलन करने के लिए अंतर्राष्ट्रीय वायु परिवहन संघ [IATA] के डेटा पर निर्भर करता है।

questions.question: Which Constitution Amendment Act inserted Article 21-A to the Constitution of India as a fundamental Right? >किस संविधान संशोधन अधिनियम ने भारत के संविधान में अनुच्छेद 21-ए को मौलिक अधिकार के रूप में शामिल किया?
questions.explanation: The 86th Constitutional Amendment Act, 2002 provided Right to Education as a Fundamental Right in Part III of the Constitution. The same amendment inserted 21A which made Right to Education a Fundamental Right for children between 6 to 14 years of age. Digi Yatra Foundation was set up as a joint venture company in 2019 under section 8 of the Companies Act, 2013. > 86वें संविधान संशोधन अधिनियम, 2002 ने संविधान के भाग III में शिक्षा के अधिकार को मौलिक अधिकार के रूप में शामिल किया। इसी संशोधन में धारा 21A को शामिल किया गया, जिसने 6 से 14 वर्ष की आयु के बच्चों के लिए शिक्षा के अधिकार को मौलिक अधिकार बना दिया।

questions.question: Punchhi Commission is related to:
questions.explanation: The Government of India constituted a commission on centre-state relations under the chairmanship of Justice Madan Mohan Punchhi on 27 April 2007 to look into the new issues of centre state relationship.

questions.question: What phylum do sponges belong to? > स्पंज किस संघ से संबंधित है?
questions.explanation: Porifera means 'hole bearer' or sponge. Animals that fall into this association are commonly called sponges. They are multicellular organisms/ aquatic animals which usually live on rock or any solid material. Animals falling in this category are - Sycon, Spongilla, Hylonema, Cliona etc., while in protozoa - Amoeba, Paramecium, Euglena and in AnnelidaEarthworm, Leeches, Polychaete etc. Phylum CnidariaSea anemones and Corals. >पोरिफेरा का अर्थ है 'छिद्र धारण करने वाला' या स्पंज। इस संघ में आने वाले जानवरों को आमतौर पर स्पंज कहा जाता है। वे बहुकोशिकीय जीव/ जलीय जानवर हैं जो आमतौर पर चट्टान या किसी ठोस पदार्थ पर रहते हैं। इस श्रेणी में आने वाले जानवर - साइकोन, स्पोंजिला, हाइलोनेमा, क्लियोना आदि हैं, जबकि प्रोटोजोआ में - अमीबा, पैरामीशियम, यूग्लेना हैं और एनेलिडा में केंचुआ, जोंक, पॉलीचेट आदि हैं। फाइलम निडारिया समुद्री एनीमोन और कोरल हैं।

questions.explanation: Column-A Column-B I. Fat D. Glycerol and fatty acid II. Protein C. Amino acid III. Carbohydrate A. Sugar IV. Mineral B. Calcium and sodium

questions.question: Which five-year Plan was prepared and launched by D.P. Dhar? >डी.पी. धर ने कौन सी पंचवर्षीय योजना तैयार की और शुरू की?
options: Fifth Five Year Plan>पांचवीं पंचवर्षीय योजना
Sixth Five Year Plan>छठी पंचवर्षीय योजना

questions.question: The law of demand states that:- >मांग का नियम कहता है कि:-
options: if the price of a goods increases, the demand for that goods decreases>यदि किसी वस्तु की कीमत बढ़ जाती है, तो उस वस्तु की मांग कम हो जाती है
if the price of a goods increases. the the demand for that goods increases>यदि किसी वस्तु की कीमत बढ़ जाती है, तो उस वस्तु की मांग बढ़ जाती है
if the price of a goods increases, the quantity demand of that goods decreases >यदि किसी वस्तु की कीमत बढ़ जाती है, तो उस वस्तु की मात्रा की मांग कम हो जाती है
if the price of a goods increases, the quantity demand of that goods increases.>यदि किसी वस्तु की कीमत बढ़ जाती है, तो उस वस्तु की मात्रा की मांग बढ़ जाती है।
questions.explanation: Law of demand is the relationship between the price of the goods and the quantity of the consumer is willing to and able to purchase in specified time period, keeping constant tastes, income, price of related goods, expectations and number of buyers. Demand curve shows that as the price of goods increases, demand for the goods will decrease. >मांग का नियम वस्तुओं की कीमत और उपभोक्ता द्वारा निर्दिष्ट समय अवधि में खरीदने की इच्छा और क्षमता के बीच का संबंध है, जिसमें स्वाद, आय, संबंधित वस्तुओं की कीमत, अपेक्षाएं और खरीदारों की संख्या स्थिर रहती है। मांग वक्र दर्शाता है कि जैसे-जैसे वस्तुओं की कीमत बढ़ती है, वस्तुओं की मांग घटती जाती है।

questions.question: Aqua-regia is a mixture of………. >एक्वा-रेजिया .......... का मिश्रण है।
options: dilute hydrochloric acid and concentrated nitric acid>तनु हाइड्रोक्लोरिक एसिड और सांद्र नाइट्रिक एसिड
dilute sulphuric acid and dilute hydrochloric acid>तनु सल्फ्यूरिक एसिड और तनु हाइड्रोक्लोरिक एसिड
concentrated sulphuric acid and dilute nitric acid >सांद्र सल्फ्यूरिक एसिड और तनु नाइट्रिक एसिड
concentrated hydrochloric acid and concentrated nitric acid>सांद्र हाइड्रोक्लोरिक एसिड और सांद्र नाइट्रिक एसिड
questions.explanation: Aqua-regia is obtained by mixing 3 part of concentrated hydrochloric acid([HCl] and 1 part of concentrated nitric acid [HNO3]. It is used to separate silver and gold. > एक्वा-रेजिया को 3 भाग सांद्र हाइड्रोक्लोरिक एसिड [HCl] और 1 भाग सांद्र नाइट्रिक एसिड [HNO3] को मिलाकर प्राप्त किया जाता है। इसका उपयोग चांदी और सोने को अलग करने के लिए किया जाता है।

questions.question: Which elements has pungent odour and is dank red-brown liquid with atomic number 35? >किस तत्व की गंध तीखी होती है और यहलाल-भूरे रंग का तरल होता है जिसका परमाणु क्रमांक 35 होता है?
questions.explanation: Bromine is an element of halogen family which is an non-metal. If occur as liquid at room temperature and smells with pungent odors. questions.question: What do you call the effect of splitting of a spectral line into several components in the presence of a static magnetic field?
questions.explanation: Zeeman Effect explains about the splitting of a spectral line into several components in the presence of a static magnetic field. It is named after the Dutch physicist Pieter Zeeman who discovered it in 1896 and received a Nobel Prize for this discovery. >ज़ीमन प्रभाव एक स्थिर चुंबकीय क्षेत्र की उपस्थिति में एक वर्णक्रमीय रेखा के कई घटकों में विभाजित होने के बारे में बताता है। इसका नाम डच भौतिक विज्ञानी पीटर ज़ीमन के नाम पर रखा गया है जिन्होंने 1896 में इसकी खोज की थी और इस खोज के लिए नोबेल पुरस्कार प्राप्त किया था।

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error.
options: one of my colleagues own a bookstore.
questions.explanation: The error is in segment "one of my colleagues own a bookstore." CONCEPT: • The phrase "one of my colleagues" refers to a singular colleague from a group. • When "one of" is followed by a plural noun [colleagues], the verb must still be singular because it agrees with "one," not "colleagues." • "Own" is incorrect because it is a plural verb. The correct singular form is "owns." Correct Sentence: "I bought all my books at a discounted price because one of my colleagues owns a bookstore."

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank. She stole a quick _________ at her notes before answering the question.
questions.explanation: The correct answer is "Glance." Explanation: The word "glance" means a quick or brief look at something, which fits the context of someone quickly looking at his or her notes before answering a question. The phrase "steal a glance" is commonly used to describe a quick, often secretive look. Here are the meanings and examples of all options: • Glimpse -झलक – A brief, incomplete view of something. • Example: "I caught a glimpse of the celebrity before he left." • Glower - तिरस्कारपूर्ण घूरना – To stare angrily at someone. • Example: "She glowered at him after the rude remark." • Glance -झलक / सरसरी निगाह डालना– A quick, brief look. • Example: "She stole a quick glance at her notes before answering." • Glare -क्रोधित / तीव्र नजर डालना– To stare harshly or a strong, bright light. • Example: "The teacher gave a glare at the noisy students." Conclusion: The best choice is "Glance," as it correctly describes the action of looking briefly at notes.

questions.question: Select the option that will improve the underlined part of the given sentence. In case no improvement is needed, select 'No improvement required'. How dared you to question my honesty in front of everyone?
options: dare you to question my honesty
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: dare you question my honesty Explanation: • The phrase "How dare you" is a fixed expression used to express disbelief or challenge someone's actions. It is always followed by the base form of the verb without "to." [Bare infinitive]. • "How dared you" is incorrect because "dare" in this context acts like a modal verb [similar to "can" or "must"], which does not take a past tense form like "dared." • "To question" is also incorrect because modal verbs [like "dare" in this sentence] do not require "to" before the main verb. Corrected Sentence: "How dare you question my honesty in front of everyone?"

questions.question: Select the Grammatically correct sentence -
options: Some of the employees was unable to attend the meeting due to bad weather.
She is much smarter than her elder sister.
Despite the hardships, he adapted quickly to the new environment.
The price of my laptop is way more than yours.
questions.explanation: Correct Answer: She is much smarter than her elder sister. Explanation: • [B] She is much smarter than her elder sister. • The phrase "much smarter" is correct because "much" is used to emphasize the comparative degree of "smarter." Why the other options are incorrect? • Option [A] Some of the employees was unable to attend the meeting due to bad weather. • Error: "was" should be replaced with "were" because "employees" is plural. • Corrected Sentence: Some of the employees were unable to attend the meeting due to bad weather. • Option [C] Despite the hardships, he adapted quickly to the new environment. • Error: The verb "adapt" requires a reflexive pronoun when referring to oneself. • Corrected Sentence: Despite the hardships, he adapted himself quickly to the new environment. • Option [D] The price of my laptop is way more than yours. • Error: The price of one laptop should be compared to the price of another laptop, so "that of" should be used. • Corrected Sentence: The price of my laptop is way more than that of yours.

questions.question: Identify the word that is correctly spelt.
questions.explanation: The correct spelling is "Gaiety." Here are the correct spellings and meanings of all options: • Ettiquete [Incorrect] → Etiquette [Correct] – शिष्टाचार – The customary code of polite behaviour in society. Example: "Good etiquette is essential at formal dinners." • Groovey [Incorrect] → Groovy [Correct] – शानदार / आकर्षक – Fashionable, exciting, or enjoyable. Example: "The band played some groovy music at the party." • Gazzette [Incorrect] → Gazette [Correct] – राजपत्र / समाचार पत्र – An official journal or newspaper. Example: "The government published the new law in the official gazette." • Gaiety [Correct] – आनंद / उल्लास – A state of happiness and festivity. Example: "The festival was filled with laughter and gaiety." Therefore, "Gaiety" is the correct spelling.

questions.question: Select the option that will improve the underlined part of the given sentence. In case no improvement is needed, select 'No improvement required'. The popularity of the new policy did not go in well with the employees.
questions.explanation: Use "Go down." Explanation: • The phrase "go down well" means to be received in a good or acceptable manner, which fits the context of the sentence. • The sentence states that the new policy was not well received by the employees, so "go down" is the correct phrase. Meanings and Examples of All Options: • Go through – गुजरना / अनुभव करना – To experience or undergo something. Example: "She had to go through a lot of hardships to succeed." • Go down – स्वीकार किया जाना / पसंद आना – To be received in a particular way. Example: "His speech went down well with the audience." • Go up – बढ़ना / ऊपर जाना – To increase in value or rise. Example: "The price of petrol has gone up again." • Go in – प्रवेश करना / शामिल होना – To enter or take part in something. Example: "She went in for the competition with great confidence." Conclusion: The correct phrase "go down" accurately conveys the intended meaning of the policy not being well received.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate synonym of the underlined word in the following sentence - The ONUS is on the prosecution to provide proof of guilt.
questions.explanation: Sol: Correct Answer: Responsibility Explanation: The word "onus" means duty, responsibility, or obligation. In the given sentence, "The onus is on the prosecution to provide proof of guilt" means that it is the responsibility of the prosecution to prove guilt. Let's see the meaning of all the words along with their usage: • Onus – ज़िम्मेदारी / भार – A duty or responsibility, especially one that is burdensome. Example: "The onus is on the student to complete their assignments on time." • Responsibility – जिम्मेदारी / उत्तरदायित्व – The state or duty of being accountable for something. Example: "It is the responsibility of parents to take care of their children." • Threat – धमकी / खतरा – A statement of intent to cause harm or danger. Example: "The police took the bomb threat seriously." • Hope – आशा / उम्मीद – A feeling of expectation and desire for a certain thing to happen. Example: "She had hope that things would get better soon." • Investigation – जांच / पड़ताल – The process of examining something thoroughly to uncover facts. Example: "The police launched an investigation into the robbery." Conclusion: The correct synonym for "ONUS" is "responsibility," as both words refer to a duty or obligation.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate antonym of the given word. FLORID
questions.explanation: Let's see the meaning of all the words along with their usage: • Florid – बहुत सजीव / लालिमा युक्त – Excessively intricate, elaborate, or having a red complexion. Example: "His florid speech was filled with unnecessary details." • Obscure – अस्पष्ट / अज्ञात – Not clear, unknown, or difficult to understand. Example: "The meaning of his poem was obscure to many readers." • Jovial – हंसमुख / प्रसन्न – Cheerful and full of good humour. Example: "His jovial nature made him popular among his friends." • Pale – फीका / रंगहीन – Lacking colour, light in complexion. Example: "After being sick for days, she looked pale and weak." • Anger – क्रोध / गुस्सा – A strong feeling of displeasure or rage. Example: "His face turned red with anger when he heard the bad news." Conclusion: The correct antonym for "Florid" is "Pale," as florid refers to a reddish or elaborate appearance, while pale means lacking colour or brightness.

questions.question: Choose the most appropriate option to make the sentence sensibly correct. The committee was divided ________ the proposal, leading to a heated debate.
questions.explanation: Explanation: The correct preposition to use with "divided" when referring to differing opinions or disagreements is "over." Meanings and Examples of All Options: • In – में – Used to indicate inclusion or location within something. Example: "She is in the room." [Incorrect, because "divided in" is not used when referring to opinions.] • On – पर – Used when referring to a specific subject or topic. Example: "The lecture was on climate change." [Incorrect, because "divided on" is less common than "divided over" in this context.] • Over – पर / को लेकर – Used to indicate disagreement or dispute about a topic. Example: "They were divided over the decision to increase taxes." [Correct, because "divided over" is the appropriate phrase for debates or disagreements.] • Between – के बीच – Used when referring to two distinct people or things. Example: "The secret was shared between two friends." [Incorrect, because "divided between" is used for physical division, not opinions.] Corrected Sentence: "The committee was divided over the proposal, leading to a heated debate."

questions.question: Select the most appropriate meaning for the given idiom. Pin-money
options: A small amount of money for personal expenses
questions.explanation: The correct answer is: A small amount of money for personal expenses. Explanation: "Pin-money" – "छोटे व्यक्तिगत खर्चों के लिए धन" This idiom refers to a small sum of money, typically set aside for minor personal expenses. Historically, it was used to describe the small allowance given to a woman for personal use. Origin of the Idiom: The phrase originated in the 17th century when women were given a small sum of money to buy "pins" and other minor accessories. Over time, it came to represent any small allowance for personal spending. Example: "She saved some pin-money from her weekly budget to buy a new book." Hindi: "उसने अपनी साप्ताहिक बजट से थोड़े व्यक्तिगत खर्च के लिए पैसे बचाए।" Conclusion: The correct meaning of "Pin-money" is "A small amount of money for personal expenses."

questions.question: Identify the segment in the sentence that contains grammatical error.
questions.explanation: The error is in segment: You are stronger than him CONCEPT: • The phrase "You are stronger than him" is incorrect because "than" is a conjunction introducing a clause. • The correct comparison should be "You are stronger than he", where "he" is the subject of an implied verb "[is]" → "You are stronger than he [is]." • "Him" is an object pronoun and cannot be used as the subject of the implied clause. Corrected Sentence: "You are stronger than HE, so you can easily defeat him in the match."

questions.question: Select the most appropriate SYNONYM of the given word. PURGE
questions.explanation: The correct answer is: Purify. Let's see the meaning of all the words along with their usage: • Purge – शुद्ध करना / निकाल देना – To remove unwanted elements, often forcefully or completely. Example: "The government decided to purge corrupt officials from the system." • Purify – शुद्ध करना – To cleanse something of impurities or unwanted elements. Example: "The water was purified before drinking." • Clarify – स्पष्ट करना – To make something more understandable or clear. Example: "She clarified her statement to avoid misunderstandings." • Dislike – नापसंद करना – To have an aversion or negative feeling towards something. Example: "He dislikes spicy food." • Desire – इच्छा / चाहत – A strong feeling of wanting something. Example: "She had a strong desire to travel the world." Conclusion: The correct synonym for "Purge" is "Purify," as both words refer to the process of cleansing or removing unwanted elements.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate antonym of the underlined word in the following sentence- My father believes you all have a NEFARIOUS purpose here.
questions.explanation: The correct answer is - Noble. Explanation: The word "nefarious" means wicked, evil, or criminal. The antonym should express the opposite, meaning honourable or good. Let's see the meaning of all the words along with their usage: • Nefarious – दुष्ट / अनैतिक – Extremely wicked or evil. Example: "The villain had a nefarious plan to take over the city." • Ultimate – अंतिम / सर्वोच्च – The final or most significant. Example: "His ultimate goal is to become a doctor." • Wicked – दुष्ट / बुरा – Evil or morally wrong. Example: "The wicked witch cast a spell on the villagers." • Primary – मुख्य / प्रारंभिक – First in importance or fundamental. Example: "Education should be a primary concern for every nation." • Noble – महान / उदार – Having high moral qualities, honorable. Example: "He dedicated his life to a noble cause." Conclusion: The correct antonym for "Nefarious" is "Noble," as both words represent opposite moral values—evil vs. honourable.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blanks. The earthquake ______the country to the ground.
questions.explanation: The sentence should read: "The earthquake razed the country to the ground." This means that the earthquake completely destroyed the country’s structures. Explanation of the Other Options: • Rage – "क्रोध / उग्रता" – Intense anger or violent force. Example: "The storm raged through the city for hours." • Raze – "समतल कर देना / नष्ट कर देना" – To completely destroy a building, town, or other structure. Example: "The old building was razed to make way for a new mall." • Raise – "ऊपर उठाना / निर्माण करना" – To lift or build something. Example: "They raised a monument in honor of the soldiers." • Rays – "किरणें / प्रकाश" – Beams of light. Example: "The sun's rays warmed the cold morning air." Conclusion: The correct word is "Razed," as it accurately conveys the meaning of complete destruction caused by the earthquake.

questions.question: Select the word which means the same as the group of words. A person who looks after horses at an inn
questions.explanation: The correct answer is: Ostler. Here are the explanations for all options: • Farrier – "घोड़ों का नाल ठोंकने वाला" – A person who specializes in shoeing horses and caring for their hooves. Example: "The farrier visited the stable to fit new horseshoes." • Shepherd – "गड़रिया / चरवाहा" – A person who looks after sheep. Example: "The shepherd guided his flock across the hills." • Jockey – "घुड़सवार / घुड़दौड़ का सवार" – A person who rides horses in races. Example: "The jockey won the championship race." • Ostler – "घोड़ों की देखभाल करने वाला" – A person who looks after horses at an inn or stable. Example: "The ostler fed and groomed the horses at the coaching inn." Conclusion: The correct choice is "Ostler," as it refers to a person who looks after horses at an inn.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom. She found her grandfather hale and hearty, walking five miles each day before breakfast.
options: In good health and full of energy
questions.explanation: Hale and Hearty – पूर्ण रूप से स्वस्थ और ऊर्जावान होना "Hale and hearty" means to be in good health and full of energy. It is often used to describe elderly people who are still strong and active. Origin of this Idiom: The phrase originates from old English, where "hale" meant healthy and "hearty" referred to being full of life and enthusiasm. Together, they emphasize excellent health and vitality. Example: "Even at the age of 90, the former athlete remained hale and hearty, participating in community events regularly." [This means the athlete was still strong, energetic, and in good health despite his old age.] Hindi Translation: "90 साल की उम्र में भी, पूर्व एथलीट पूरी तरह स्वस्थ और ऊर्जावान थे और सामुदायिक कार्यक्रमों में नियमित रूप से भाग लेते थे।" Conclusion: The correct answer is "In good health and full of energy," as it best represents the meaning of "Hale and Hearty."

questions.question: Select the word which means the same as the group of words given. A natural skill at doing something
questions.explanation: The correct answer is: Knack. Meanings and Examples of the Given Options: • Proficiency – "निपुणता / प्रवीणता" – A high level of skill or expertise in a subject, usually acquired through learning and practice. Example: "His proficiency in multiple languages helped him secure an international job." • Dexterity – "कुशलता / चातुर्य" – Skill in performing tasks, especially with hands or quick thinking. Example: "The surgeon’s dexterity allowed him to perform complex operations with ease." • Knack – "स्वाभाविक प्रतिभा / विशेष कौशल" – A natural ability to do something well, often without formal training. Example: "She has a knack for solving puzzles quickly." • Tyro – "नौसिखिया / नवसिखुआ" – A beginner or someone new to a field or activity. Example: "Although he is a tyro in photography, his passion for the subject is evident." Conclusion: The correct word for "A natural skill at doing something" is "Knack," as it represents an innate ability rather than a learned skill.

questions.question: Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful paragraph. A. This has made it a favourite among fitness enthusiasts. B. Yoga improves flexibility, strength, and mental clarity. C. It is also known to reduce stress and anxiety. D. Yoga is an ancient practice with numerous health benefits.
questions.explanation: The correct answer is: DBCA This order makes sense because: • Sentence D introduces the topic: yoga and its benefits. • Sentence B explains the physical and mental benefits. • Sentence C adds more benefits: stress and anxiety reduction. • Sentence A concludes by stating its popularity. Final paragraph: "Yoga is an ancient practice with numerous health benefits. It improves flexibility, strength, and mental clarity. It is also known to reduce stress and anxiety. This has made it a favourite among fitness enthusiasts."

questions.question: Choose the most appropriate option to change the voice of the given sentence. He has to hear it to understand it.
options: It has to be heard to being understood.
It has to be heard to be understood.
It needs to being heard to be understood.
It have to be heard to understand.
questions.explanation: Explanation: Active voice structure: He [Subject] + has to hear [Verb] + it [Object] + to understand it. Passive voice structure: It [Object] + has to be heard [Verb3] + to be understood. • This option correctly changes the sentence from active to passive voice, placing "it" as the focus of the sentence instead of "he." • The phrase "has to hear" is converted into "has to be heard" [past participle form], and "to understand" is changed to "to be understood" to maintain the correct meaning. Corrected Sentence: "It has to be heard to be understood."

questions.question: Change the narration of the given sentence. Rahul said that he had already submitted the assignment when the deadline was announced.
options: Rahul said, "I have already submitted the assignment when the deadline is announced."
Rahul said, "I had already submitted the assignment when the deadline was announced."
Rahul said, "I already submit the assignment when the deadline was announced."
Rahul said, "I will submit the assignment when the deadline is announced."
questions.explanation: Explanation: • The sentence is in indirect speech [past perfect tense: "had submitted"]. • To convert it to direct speech, we replace "he" with "I" and remove "that" while keeping "had submitted" unchanged. • The clause "when the deadline was announced" remains the same. Why Option [A] is Wrong- • Incorrect Tense: Changes "had submitted" [past perfect] to "have submitted" [present perfect], which is not appropriate for a past event. • Mismatch with Time Clause: Uses "is announced" [present] instead of "was announced" [past], disrupting the past context. Thus, “Rahul said, "I had already submitted the assignment when the deadline was announced." is the correct answer.

questions.question: Scientists have recently developed a gel that helps brains ____1____ from traumatic injuries, such as those suffered in combat, car accidents, falls, or gunshot wounds. This gel, created by Dr. Ning Zhang at Clemson University in South Carolina, is ____2____ in liquid form at the injury site, stimulating the growth of stem cells. Brain injuries are notoriously difficult to repair because the damaged tissues tend to swell, ____3____ additional harm to the surrounding cells. Traditional treatments have focused on minimizing this secondary damage by lowering the temperature or relieving pressure at the injury site, though these methods have often been _____4_____. Recently, scientists have explored transplanting donor brain cells to repair damaged tissue. Dr. Zhang’s gel can be customized with different chemicals to stimulate various biological processes at the injury site. In previous studies on rats, she used the gel to restore full blood supply to the brain injury site, potentially creating a ____5____ favourable environment for donor cells. In a subsequent study, Dr. Zhang loaded the gel with immature stem cells and the necessary chemicals for their development into adult brain cells. Choose the most appropriate option to fill in the blank 1 -
questions.explanation: Explanation – The correct answer is- recover. The verb "recover" is in the infinitive form, which is suitable for this sentence structure. The sentence should read: "Scientists have recently developed a gel that helps brains recover from traumatic injuries..." This choice of verb tense is consistent with the sentence's meaning, which describes the gel's purpose and function.
